title: Register then log in and reach the admin dashboard
description: Verifies a user can register, then log in, and land on the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new username or email into the username/email input field
Fill a valid password into the password input field
Fill the same valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Navigate to /login
Fill in the username/email field with the newly registered username or email
Fill in the password field with the newly registered password
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Registration shows validation errors for non-matching passwords
description: Verifies registration blocks submission and shows validation when passwords do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new username or email into the username/email input field
Fill a valid password into the password input field
Fill a different valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: Login shows an error with incorrect credentials
description: Verifies the login form shows an authentication or validation error when credentials are invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill a validly formatted username or email into the username/email input field
Fill an incorrect password into the password input field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error or form validation error is visible

title: Login requires required fields
description: Verifies the login form validates required fields when submitted empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: Registration requires required fields
description: Verifies the registration form validates required fields when submitted empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Submit the registration form
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: Register rejects clearly invalid email format
description: Verifies the registration form shows validation when an invalid email is entered.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill an invalid email format into the username/email input field
Fill a valid password into the password input field
Fill the same valid password into the confirm password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a form validation error is visible

title: Admin dashboard loads stat cards and recent activity
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can view dashboard stat cards and the recent activity table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username/email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Verify stat cards are displayed
Verify a recent activity table is displayed

title: Admin dashboard indicates live stats are unavailable when applicable
description: Verifies the dashboard can show an indication that live stats are unavailable (if presented by the UI).

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username/email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Wait for the dashboard content to finish loading
Verify an indication is visible that live stats are unavailable or stale

title: Servers page shows the server data table
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can load the servers list and see the server table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username/email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/servers
Verify a server data table is displayed

title: Create server via modal and see it listed
description: Verifies an admin can create a server through the creation form and see the new server in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username/email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/servers
Initiate server creation
Fill "AutoTest Server A" into the server name field
Select a valid node
Select a valid egg
Fill a valid memory amount into the memory field
Fill a valid disk amount into the disk field
Fill a valid CPU limit into the CPU field
Submit the server creation form
Verify a server named "AutoTest Server A" is listed in the server data table

title: Server creation shows validation for missing required fields
description: Verifies the server creation form shows validation errors when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username/email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/servers
Initiate server creation
Submit the server creation form
Verify form validation errors are visible

title: Create a new node and see it listed
description: Verifies an admin can create a node from the Nodes page and the new node appears in the node table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the nodes admin page
Click the action to create a new node
Fill a valid node name into the node name field using Node TC001
Fill valid values into the remaining required node creation fields
Submit the node creation form
Verify Node TC001 is listed in the node data table

title: Node creation validation errors for missing/invalid data
description: Verifies required validation prevents node creation when the form is incomplete or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the nodes admin page
Click the action to create a new node
Leave required node creation fields empty or invalid
Submit the node creation form
Verify form validation errors are visible
Verify the node creation modal remains open

title: Nodes page loads and displays node data table
description: Verifies the Nodes page primary content (node table) is visible for an authenticated admin.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the nodes admin page
Verify the node data table is displayed

title: Cancel node creation closes the modal without adding a node
description: Verifies dismissing the node creation flow closes the modal and does not add a new row.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the nodes admin page
Click the action to create a new node
Fill a valid node name into the node name field using Node TC004
Dismiss the node creation modal
Verify the node creation modal is not visible
Verify Node TC004 is not listed in the node data table

title: Create multiple nodes sequentially
description: Verifies an admin can create more than one node in a single session and both appear in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the nodes admin page
Click the action to create a new node
Fill a valid node name into the node name field using Node TC005-A
Fill valid values into the remaining required node creation fields
Submit the node creation form
Click the action to create a new node
Fill a valid node name into the node name field using Node TC005-B
Fill valid values into the remaining required node creation fields
Submit the node creation form
Verify Node TC005-A is listed in the node data table
Verify Node TC005-B is listed in the node data table

title: Create a new user and see it listed
description: Verifies an admin can create a user from the Users page and the new user appears in the user table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the users admin page
Click the action to create a new user
Fill a valid email into the email field using tc006.user@example.com
Fill a valid username into the username field using tc006user
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill valid values into any remaining required user creation fields
Submit the user creation form
Verify tc006.user@example.com is listed in the user data table

title: User creation validation errors for missing fields
description: Verifies required validation prevents user creation when mandatory fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the users admin page
Click the action to create a new user
Fill a valid email into the email field using tc007.user@example.com
Leave other required user creation fields empty
Submit the user creation form
Verify form validation errors are visible
Verify the user creation modal remains open

title: Users page loads and displays user data table
description: Verifies the Users page primary content (user table) is visible for an authenticated admin.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the users admin page
Verify the user data table is displayed

title: Cancel user creation closes the modal without adding a user
description: Verifies dismissing the user creation flow closes the modal and does not add a new row.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the users admin page
Click the action to create a new user
Fill a valid email into the email field using tc009.user@example.com
Fill a valid username into the username field using tc009user
Dismiss the user creation modal
Verify the user creation modal is not visible
Verify tc009.user@example.com is not listed in the user data table

title: Eggs page loads and displays egg configurations list
description: Verifies the Eggs page primary content is visible for an authenticated admin.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the eggs admin page
Verify the egg data table is displayed
